final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, wide cinematic landscape
Primary request: vintage American road trip scene with a red convertible driving on Route 66 through desert at sunset
Scene/backdrop: Route 66 desert highway stretching to the horizon, flanked by arid scrubland, saguaro cacti, and distant mesa formations
Subject: classic red convertible car (1950s–1960s American style), top down, driving away from camera along a straight two-lane blacktop road
Style/medium: photorealistic, vintage Americana aesthetic, warm film photography feel
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, low horizon line, road centered leading the eye to vanishing point, 35mm lens
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunset, sky blazing in deep orange, amber, and crimson; long warm shadows stretching across the asphalt; free-spirited, nostalgic, open-road energy
Color palette: burnt orange and crimson sky, warm golden light on red car, dusty tan desert floor, muted sage green cacti
Materials/textures: weathered asphalt with faded yellow center line, dusty desert sand, glossy car paint catching sunset glow, rough cactus skin
Constraints: keep Route 66 road sign visible or implied; no modern vehicles or billboards; preserve the open, boundless desert atmosphere
Avoid: oversaturated neon tones, cluttered background, modern highway infrastructure, watermark
